prompt: A realistic first-person perspective photo in a softly lit minimalist bedroom at night, as if the viewer is standing very close to a standing mirror and looking at their own reflection. In the foreground, strands of long dark hair hang down from the top edge and both sides of the frame, partially obscuring the view, with one hand raised near the left side of the face as if touching the cheek or hair. In the mirror reflection, a young woman with dark brown long straight hair is centered, wearing a loose ivory or off-white long-sleeve pajama top with delicate tiny floral texture and oversized sleeves. She poses shyly with both hands tucked under her chin, elbows inward, giving a soft, intimate, slightly bashful mood. Her face is hidden or obscured, creating an anonymous point-of-view self-portrait feeling. The mirror has a simple white frame and sits on a white vanity surface. In the background reflected in the mirror is a neatly arranged warm beige bedroom with 1 unmade bed covered in white bedding, 1 small wooden nightstand or low shelf, 1 glowing table lamp with a square white shade, and 2 tiny decorative objects beside the lamp. On the right side of the vanity are 2 clear skincare or cosmetic bottles and 1 small round white container. Use warm ambient lighting, creamy neutral tones, shallow depth of field, gentle realism, smartphone-photo composition, cozy Japanese apartment aesthetic, candid domestic atmosphere, and subtle imperfections rather than studio polish.
